description: Complete the IT procurement lifecycle for three 'Dell Precision 3660' workstations (Type: Workstation) from vendor 'Dell Inc'. Create a Purchase Order for 3 units at $2,500.00 each and process it to 'Ordered' status. Receive the items into inventory using the following details: Serial 'DELL-CAD-001' with Asset Tag 'WS-ENG-101', Serial 'DELL-CAD-002' with Asset Tag 'WS-ENG-102', and Serial 'DELL-CAD-003' with Asset Tag 'WS-ENG-103'.
